requests.title: OneShot: The Pancake Episode
requests.details: Did you know? Today happens to be the ninth anniversary of OneShot Solstice!  To celebrate, let's give it one more shot and play the most important game ever, OneShot: The Pancake Episode.  I'll also co-comm to help voice the characters again if you want.

ZOOTR6.body:
I want ZOOTR6 to be the best Randomizer series I've created in every way. ZOOTR6 will be a combination of Ocarina of Time and Majora's Mask with very challenging randomizer settings. I intend to make this as the best series yet on my channel, with consistent uploads once started.

Having ZOOTR6 as the first main project on my new computer would be a great way to get things started.

===How Party Funding Works===
ZOOTR6 is a $2,500 crowd-funded goal. You don't have to donate the full amount yourself, any donation goes directly toward the total. Multiple people can contribute together until the goal is fully funded. The progress bar on the card shows exactly how close we are!
ZOOTR6.title: ZOOTR6
ZOOTR6.subtitle: OoT x MM Combined Randomizer

VERSUS.body:
Request to Versus me! There are 2 options:

===Option 1 — Livestream Versus===
We livestream a Versus that's a maximum of 10 hours long. You choose the game and Versus options, get creative!

===Option 2 — Recorded Versus===
We record a Versus one-off and I edit it into a high quality video for AttackingTucans

===Party Funding===
If multiple people want to crowd-fund towards a Versus together and add more players to the race, you can split the cost. So if it was 4 players, the price would be $125 per player.
VERSUS.title: VERSUS
VERSUS.subtitle: Create and challenge me in any Versus!

GAME.body:
Choose what game I play on live-stream, and record to potentially upload as a Youtube video, most likely to my edited VOD channel WideTucan.

Here's the pricing structure:

###$125 — 90 Minute Game Request
###$200 — 3 Hour Game Request
###$375 — 6 Hour Game Request
GAME.title: GAME REQUEST
GAME.subtitle: Choose any game for me to stream live for at least 90 minutes!

WHEEL.body:
Choose a game from my game library to put on our wheel! Every 8 game requests put on the wheel will result in the wheel being spun. The winning game will be played as a 90 minute game request.

Wheel requests not selected move to the compiler. If 10 requests of 1 game are in the compiler, they transform into a 2 hour game request on the event list.
WHEEL.title: WHEEL REQUEST
WHEEL.subtitle: Winning Game gets live streamed for 90 minutes!
